name: Chart House Mud Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Nabisco chocolate wafers and mix with melted butter until well combined.
2. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Cover the crushed wafer layer with coffee ice cream.
4. Place the pie in the freezer until the ice cream is firm.
5. Spread cold fudge sauce over the frozen ice cream, placing it back in the freezer for a short time if needed to make spreading easier.
6. Store the pie in the freezer for approximately 10 hours before serving.
Presentation:
Slice the mud pie into eight portions and serve on chilled dessert plates with chilled forks.
Top each portion with whipped cream and slivered almonds.
